title: oxytenanthera thwaitesii
intro: Oxytenanthera thwaitesii, also known as the climbing palm, is a species of palm tree native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. The health benefits of Oxytenanthera thwaitesii also include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of respiratory issues. Oxytenanthera thwaitesii can be used in herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, where the leaves and roots are typically used to create remedies for various ailments.
